title: Externe RepoBrief-Manifeste consumerlokal und generisch veröffentlichen
goal: Publish external RepoBrief/Lenskit bundle references portably by materializing every declared bundle member into a consumer-local, content-addressed subtree with SHA-256 and byte verification, while keeping existing consumer path boundaries fail-closed.

acceptance.assertion: The publisher copies the bundle manifest, every declared artifact and supported linked sidecar into a content-addressed subtree below publication_root and publishes only relative references that resolve inside that root.

Materialization verifies canonical lowercase SHA-256 and byte counts while copying, re-verifies reused trees, and rejects traversal, missing files, malformed declarations and conflicting integrity metadata before publishing external manifests.
A published consumer-local bundle remains readable and hash-identical after the original producer-side bundle is removed; consumer path validation is not relaxed.
All requested artifact families are normalized and validated before materialization, duplicate families are deduplicated, and invalid family requests create no partial publication.
Focused tests, the complete Lenskit suite, Ruff, maintainability ratchets, CLI dogfood and GitHub CI pass on the exact implementation head.
The Lenskit PR is bound only to RBV1-T023 and merges only after fresh head/base/diff-bound review and green required checks.

The result does not claim remote freshness, semantic truth, hostile multi-user filesystem safety, garbage collection of older localized bundles, public distribution permission or merge readiness without final evidence.

validation: 27 focused external-manifest tests passed on the exact implementation head.
The complete local Lenskit suite passed on the exact head: 3970 passed, 1 skipped.
Ruff, git diff --check and the graph maintainability ratchet passed; zero new C901 violations and one baseline violation was resolved.
CLI dogfood proved that the localized bundle and integrity metadata remain valid after the producer-side source bundle is removed.
All GitHub checks passed, including pytest-full, browser-tests, planning-registration, contracts, Ruff and CodeQL.
Post-merge readback confirmed merge commit 9203f8928cdaa571cdfd099b10b2414ee7450789 and a tree byte-identical to reviewed head 7421452caa239e73bedde2acfe93a6516612757d.
metadata.outcome: Lenskit PR #1009 now publishes verified consumer-local, content-addressed copies of external RepoBrief bundles without relaxing consumer path boundaries. Reused trees fail closed on missing, unexpected, symlinked or integrity-mismatched entries; the merged tree matches the reviewed head. Joint multi-family transactions, hostile parent-directory replacement resistance and retention/GC remain explicit follow-ups.

verified_acceptance.rbv1-t023-consumer-local: Bundle manifest, declared artifacts and supported sidecars are copied below publication_root and published through relative in-root references.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t023-integrity: Copies and reused trees are verified by canonical SHA-256 and byte count; traversal, malformed declarations, collisions, symlinks, unexpected entries and changed file handles fail closed.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t023-portability: CLI dogfood removed the producer-side source and verified the localized bundle and artifacts remained readable and hash-identical.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t023-publication-atomicity: Families are normalized and validated before materialization; duplicate families are deduplicated and invalid families create no publication. Each stable family file is atomic, not a joint multi-file transaction.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t023-validation: 27 focused tests, 3970 full-suite tests, Ruff, maintainability, CLI dogfood and all GitHub checks passed on head 7421452caa239e73bedde2acfe93a6516612757d.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t023-pr-binding: PR #1009 was bound to RBV1-T023, base db2df91a51354cb6972e197afc7456087a43e70b, head 7421452caa239e73bedde2acfe93a6516612757d and diff SHA-256 8aaf128720739f43f0013b77868535221a8d68bd7517b11b3b675d2f8b1b8370 before merge.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t023-nonclaims: No remote freshness, semantic truth, hostile multi-user filesystem safety, localized-bundle garbage collection, public distribution permission or independent external review is claimed.
